comment4: If you add a stop with no coords it is ignored by the mod
comment5: The mod determines the time from the previous stop using this order of preference:
comment7: 2. else use 'dist' if that is available, and multiply by the minecart speed in seconds per block
comment8: 3. else calculate the taxicab/Manhattan distance between the stop and the previous stop using the coords, and multiply by the minecart speed as in 2.

stops.usage_notes: This station contains portals for both Yija and the [[Palace of the Ŋations]]. In the [[Ŋatacombs]] of the Palace, there is a portal with one-way access to the Leshrail Floor Waichi station.
Lag.
Near the Cenrail [[Cenrail network#Coastal Line|RAA]] station. Connects to the local Fallen Line (its own rails).
A [[FERRA]] line in the [[Density Loop]] leads to this location with the FERRA code FDTAL. FDTAL can be reached from FDTAV, which connects to Cenrail [[Cenrail network#Transversal Line|TAV]].
The nether coordinates are beyond the overworld world border.
Public-use guardian farm.

The Gold Line intersects with the Obsidian Loop (formerly itself) at this stop. There is a connection to the [[Venrail]] N1 line that leads to [[Sta Wejs]], [[Stej Ven]] (SVS). There is a nether rail leading from the Venrail N1 Sta Wejs stop to the [[Tour de Nguh]].

This area in the nether roof also contains portals to [[Þunan ŋáce|Þunan Ŋáce]] (TUN) to the southwest and [[Port Marcy]] (KCM) to the west. N-MZS is famous for containing three of [[W.D. Ngaster|W.D. Ngaster's]] obelisks and being the home of [[W.D. Gaster (chicken)|chicken Gaster]].
Public-use gold farm built by [[Þunan Qumreá]]. The gold farm contains one of [[W.D. Ngaster|W.D. Ngaster's]] obelisks.

This area in the nether roof also contains portals to [[Þunan ŋáce|Þunan Ŋáce]] (TUN) to the southwest and [[Port Marcy]] (KCM) to the west. N-MZS is famous for containing three of [[W.D. Ngaster|W.D. Ngaster's]] obelisks and being the home of [[W.D. Gaster (chicken)|chicken Gaster]].
This is the only Leshrail access to [[Xarslasja]]. Beyond the portal is a rail that leads directly to [insert Xarslasja city].
The sand in Bad to the Land is free for anyone to take by decree of Empress [[Suwi]]<ref>I wrote this.</ref>.
A [[FERRA]] line in the [[Density Loop]] leads to this location with the FERRA code FDTAL. FDTAL can be reached from FDTAV, which connects to Cenrail [[Cenrail network#Transversal Line|TAV]].
Lag.

The Gold Line intersects with the Obsidian Loop (formerly itself) at this stop. There is a connection to the [[Venrail]] N1 line that leads to [[Sta Wejs]], [[Stej Ven]] (SVS). There is a nether rail leading from the Venrail N1 Sta Wejs stop to the [[Tour de Nguh]].
The overworld location of the portal connects by single-tracked rails to Froglight Junction (DHF).
A [[Rails of Eras|local line]] attached to Cenrail KI1 and KIT leads to this location with the local code MEDN
This stop only exists as a way to pass between the Gold and Soul Lines. It has no portal, but corresponds to [[Hedamata]] (the former [[Islands of Ʒimh Gwynh]]) in the overworld.

This station incorporates portals to 3 locations inside Coldba: [[Chillvana]], [[Westerforest]], and [[Old Cuba]]. It is closest to the Cenrail [[Cenrail#Cuban Line|CBV]] station. Connected to a private line directly to the [[Madlands]].
This stop only exists as a way to pass between the Gold and Soul Lines. It has no portal, but corresponds to [[Hedamata]] (the former [[Islands of Ʒimh Gwynh]]) in the overworld.
Near the Cenrail [[Cenrail network#Coastal Line|RAA]] station. Connects to the local Fallen Line (its own rails).
A [[Cenrail network#Caluta|local line]] leads to this location in the overworld.
A [[Cenrail network#Maraśań Shuttle|local line]] attached to Cenrail MSS leads to this location with the local code MS-SIL.
Contains a warp.
This station contains portals for both Yija and the [[Palace of the Ŋations]]. In the [[Ŋatacombs]] of the Palace, there is a portal with one-way access to the Leshrail Floor Waichi station.
A [[Cenrail network#Wekañu-Skefo|local line]] leads to this location in the overworld.
Public-use guardian farm.
Previously the [[Anaqw]] station.
